'''鈭歷-th-d-r''' ('''kavathderoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:chatter|chatter]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-th-d-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chatter|chatter]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歷-th-d-r
|-
! Lemma
| kavathderoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivathderoko|thivathderoko]] || [[word:jivathderoko|jivathderoko]] || [[word:shivathderoko|shivathderoko]] || [[word:kivathderoko|kivathderoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvathderoko|thuthuvathderoko]] || [[word:jujuvathderoko|jujuvathderoko]] || [[word:shushuvathderoko|shushuvathderoko]] || [[word:kukuvathderoko|kukuvathderoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvathderoko|thuvathderoko]] || [[word:juvathderoko|juvathderoko]] || [[word:shuvathderoko|shuvathderoko]] || [[word:kuvathderoko|kuvathderoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvathderoko|thuvathderoko]] || [[word:juvathderoko|juvathderoko]] || [[word:shuvathderoko|shuvathderoko]] || [[word:kuvathderoko|kuvathderoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevathderoko|thevathderoko]] || [[word:jevathderoko|jevathderoko]] || [[word:shevathderoko|shevathderoko]] || [[word:kevathderoko|kevathderoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovathderoko|thothovathderoko]] || [[word:jojovathderoko|jojovathderoko]] || [[word:shoshovathderoko|shoshovathderoko]] || [[word:kokovathderoko|kokovathderoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovathderoko|thovathderoko]] || [[word:jovathderoko|jovathderoko]] || [[word:shovathderoko|shovathderoko]] || [[word:kovathderoko|kovathderoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovathderoko|thovathderoko]] || [[word:jovathderoko|jovathderoko]] || [[word:shovathderoko|shovathderoko]] || [[word:kovathderoko|kovathderoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙vathderoko|th忙vathderoko]] || [[word:j忙vathderoko|j忙vathderoko]] || [[word:sh忙vathderoko|sh忙vathderoko]] || [[word:k忙vathderoko|k忙vathderoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavathderoko|thathavathderoko]] || [[word:jajavathderoko|jajavathderoko]] || [[word:shashavathderoko|shashavathderoko]] || [[word:kakavathderoko|kakavathderoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavathderoko|thavathderoko]] || [[word:javathderoko|javathderoko]] || [[word:shavathderoko|shavathderoko]] || [[word:kavathderoko|kavathderoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavathderoko|thavathderoko]] || [[word:javathderoko|javathderoko]] || [[word:shavathderoko|shavathderoko]] || [[word:kavathderoko|kavathderoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shavathderithi|shavathderithi]] || [[word:shavathderiji|shavathderiji]] || [[word:shavathderishi|shavathderishi]] || [[word:shavathderiki|shavathderiki]]
